mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SEARCH_LOGS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SEARCH_LOGS ( user_id, keyword_raw, matched_keyword_id, result_count, search_at, ip_address, device_info ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{keywordRaw}, #{matchedKeywordId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{resultCount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT keyword_raw AS keyword, COUNT(*) AS searchCount FROM SEARCH_LOGS WHERE search_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY keyword_raw ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC FETCH FIRST #{topN} ROWS ONLY
